response.global_analysis: 1. Audio Match: Handled manual transcription of spoken English and Japanese dialogue from the VTuber streamer. 2. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously set to match the onset and offset of vocalizations, dealing with rapid speech by keeping the text concise.
